name: Sc0_open_healthy
description: Healthy reactor, open-loop (Qc fixed). Validation against spec Section 8.

name: Sc1_closed_healthy
description: Healthy reactor, closed-loop with PI control. Baseline.

name: Sc5_closed_saturated
description: Severe fouling -- controller saturates at Qc_max.

name: Sc6_open_with_fault
description: Open-loop simulator applied to a fault -- the failure baseline (SBI trained on this is what the paper refutes).

name: Sc7_closed_drift
description: Mild fouling plus +2 K sensor drift on T -- substudy of drift-vs-fouling identifiability.
